message:
fix(codegen): Add try wrapper for user-defined class constructors

User-defined classes in class_registry have init() returning !@This()
because __dict__ allocation can fail. Previously only nested classes and
error_init_classes were wrapped with try, causing "error union type does
not support field access" errors when accessing fields on newly
constructed class instances.

Now all user-defined class constructors are properly wrapped with try.
